mapper.select: select id, name, address, contact_name as contactName, contact_phone as contactPhone, service_time as serviceTime, sort, status from pickup_point where status = 1 order by sort asc, id asc
select id, name, address, contact_name as contactName, contact_phone as contactPhone, service_time as serviceTime, sort, status from pickup_point where id = #{id} and status = 1
